---
title: "Contact"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

:::{.contact-page}

:::{.contact-intro}

## Get in touch

For questions about my research, publications, teaching, or potential collaborations, the best way to reach me is by email.

I am a doctoral researcher in linguistics at Université Laval, working primarily on neology, corpus linguistics, lexical diffusion, and research methodology.

:::{.contact-links}

[{{< fa envelope >}} Email me](mailto:gabriel-frazer-mckee.1@ulaval.ca){.contact-button}

[{{< fa brands orcid >}} ORCID](https://orcid.org/YOUR-ORCID){.contact-button .contact-button-secondary}

:::

:::

:::{.contact-card}

### Gabriel Frazer-McKee

**Doctoral researcher in linguistics**  
Université Laval

:::{.contact-detail}
{{< fa building-columns >}}

**Affiliation**  
Département de langues, linguistique et traduction  
Université Laval
:::

:::{.contact-detail}
{{< fa location-dot >}}

**Office**  
Laboratoire langues et cultures  
Pavillon Charles-De Koninck, DKN-5152  
Québec, Canada
:::

:::{.contact-detail}
{{< fa envelope >}}

**Email**  
[Gabriel.Frazer-McKee.1@ulaval.ca](mailto:gabriel-frazer-mckee.1@ulaval.ca)
:::

:::{.contact-detail}
{{< fa language >}}

**Languages**  
English and French
:::

:::

:::
